Iridescence (vendored copy)

Source: https://github.com/koide3/iridescence
License: MIT (see `third_party/iridescence/LICENSE` and upstream `LICENSE`).

This directory documents that this project vendors and adapts the Iridescence visualization library
(no separate install/package step). Upstream copyright and license notices are retained as required
by the MIT License.

Third-party components bundled with or used by Iridescence retain their own licenses. The list below
is non-exhaustive; see the corresponding license/notice files included with each component for the
authoritative terms (e.g., Dear ImGui/ImPlot/ImGuizmo, GLFW, GLM, Eigen, portable-file-dialogs, gl3w,
RapidHash, libpng, libjpeg/libjpeg-turbo, assimp).

If you redistribute any part of this code, or binaries that statically include it, include the
corresponding license texts and notices.
